gxio/gpio.h File Reference

An API for manipulating general-purpose I/O pins. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxio_gpio_context_t
 A context object used to manage GPIO hardware resources. More...

Functions

int gxio_gpio_init (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, int gpio_index)
 Initialize a GPIO context.
int gxio_gpio_destroy (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Destroy a GPIO context.
int gxio_gpio_attach (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pin_mask)
 Request control of a set of GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Return the current state of a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins, uint64_t mask)
 Set the output state of some of a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_toggle (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Toggle (invert) the output state of some of a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_pulse_assert (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Assert some of a context's attached GPIO output pins for one GPIO clock cycle.
void gxio_gpio_pulse_deassert (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Deassert some of a context's attached GPIO output pins for one GPIO clock cycle.
void gxio_gpio_release (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Release some of a context's attached GPIO output pins.
int gxio_gpio_get_elec (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, unsigned int pin, GPIO_PAD_CONTROL_t *pad_ctl)
 Retrieve the current electrical settings for one of a context's attached GPIO pins.
int gxio_gpio_set_elec (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, unsigned int pin, GPIO_PAD_CONTROL_t pad_ctl)
 Change the current electrical settings for one of a context's attached GPIO pins.
int gxio_gpio_get_gclk_mode (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, GPIO_GCLK_MODE_t *gclk_mode)
 Retrieve the current clock settings for a context's GPIO shim.
int gxio_gpio_set_gclk_mode (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, GPIO_GCLK_MODE_t gclk_mode)
 Change the current clock settings for a context's GPIO shim.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_out_inv (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current output inversion settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_out_inv (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current output inversion settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_in_inv (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current input inversion settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_in_inv (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current input inversion settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_out_mask (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current output mask settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_out_mask (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current output mask settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_in_mask (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current input mask settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_in_mask (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current input mask settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_in_sync (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current input synchronization settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_in_sync (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current input synchronization settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
uint64_t gxio_gpio_get_in_cnd (gxio_gpio_context_t *context)
 Retrieve the current input sampling settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
void gxio_gpio_set_in_cnd (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t pins)
 Change the current input sampling settings for a context's attached GPIO pins.
int gxio_gpio_get_dir (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t *disabled_pins, uint64_t *input_pins, uint64_t *output_pins, uint64_t *output_od_pins)
 Retrieve the current input/output settings for a context's GPIO pins.
int gxio_gpio_set_dir (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t disabled_pins, uint64_t input_pins, uint64_t output_pins, uint64_t output_od_pins)
 Modify the current input/output settings for a context's GPIO pins.
int gxio_gpio_cfg_interrupt (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, int target_cpu, int target_event, uint64_t on_assert, uint64_t on_deassert)
 Request GPIO pin interrupts.
void gxio_gpio_report_interrupt (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t *asserted, uint64_t *deasserted)
 Report GPIO pin interrupts.
void gxio_gpio_report_reset_interrupt (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t *asserted, uint64_t *deasserted)
 Report and reenable GPIO pin interrupts.
void gxio_gpio_reset_interrupt (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t en_assert, uint64_t en_deassert)
 Reenable GPIO pin interrupts.
int gxio_gpio_get_pollfd (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, uint64_t on_assert, uint64_t on_deassert)
 Get a file descriptor which may be polled to determine GPIO pin state changes.
int gxio_gpio_arm_pollfd (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, int fd)
 Arm a pollable file descriptor.
int gxio_gpio_get_pinset (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, const char *name, uint64_t *input_pins, uint64_t *output_pins, uint64_t *output_od_pins, uint64_t *inverted_pins)
 Look up a named set of GPIO pins and retrieve pin characteristics.
int gxio_gpio_enumerate_pinset (gxio_gpio_context_t *context, int index, char *name, uint64_t *input_pins, uint64_t *output_pins, uint64_t *output_od_pins, uint64_t *inverted_pins)
 Retrieve the properties of one of this system's named sets of GPIO pins.

Detailed Description

An API for manipulating general-purpose I/O pins.
